primary_operations.name: Handle
primary_operations.sdk_call: c, err := websocket.Accept(w, r, nil); if err != nil { return }; defer c.Close(websocket.StatusInternalError, ""); ctx := r.Context(); for { mt, msg, err := c.Read(ctx); if err != nil { return }; if err := c.Write(ctx, mt, msg); err != nil { return } }

code_style_notes: nhooyr.io/websocket is context-aware — pass r.Context() to Read/Write for cancellation
Always defer c.Close(...) to release the connection
